tasks.title: Cargo workspace + crate skeleton
acceptance: WHEN `cargo build --workspace` is run THEN every crate (domain, engine, ingest, stream, features, rules, model, graph, compliance, simulator) SHALL compile
WHERE a crate is vertical-specific THEN it SHALL live under a verticals/ pack and the core crates SHALL NOT depend on it

tasks.title: Domain types crate (money as integer minor units)
acceptance: WHEN a monetary amount is constructed THEN it SHALL be an integer minor-unit value with an explicit currency and SHALL reject floating-point construction
WHEN a transaction is built THEN it SHALL carry amount+currency, timestamp, and references to the entities involved (card/account/device/ip/merchant/counterparty)

tasks.title: Infra: docker-compose (Redpanda, Redis, Postgres, Prometheus, Grafana)
acceptance: WHEN `docker compose up` is run THEN Redpanda, Redis, Postgres, Prometheus, and Grafana SHALL each become reachable on their documented ports and pass a healthcheck

tasks.title: Synthetic transaction generator v0 (legit baseline → backbone)
acceptance: WHEN the generator runs at a configured rate R THEN it SHALL publish schema-valid transaction events to the event backbone at approximately R per second
WHERE an entity population size is configured THEN generated transactions SHALL reuse cards/accounts/devices from that population so velocity features are meaningful

tasks.title: Wire up CI (build + test + lint, polyglot)
acceptance: WHEN a push or pull request lands THEN CI SHALL build and test the Rust workspace and run the Python lint/test for the ml/ tree

tasks.title: gRPC decision endpoint + idempotency
acceptance: WHEN a decision request with an idempotency key is received THEN the engine SHALL return a decision
WHEN a request is retried with a previously seen idempotency key THEN the engine SHALL return the original decision and SHALL NOT produce an additional state update

tasks.title: Rules engine: hot-reloadable config + blocklists
acceptance: WHEN rule configuration is updated on disk THEN the engine SHALL load the new rules without a restart
WHEN an identifier matches a blocklist THEN the decision SHALL be a hard decline carrying the rule's reason code and typology tag

tasks.title: Card rules: velocity, card-testing, BIN attack, decline-retry storm
acceptance: WHEN more than K declined authorisations occur for one card within window W THEN a decline-retry-storm rule SHALL fire
WHEN many distinct PANs sharing one BIN are tested within window W THEN a BIN-attack rule SHALL fire
WHEN a burst of low- or zero-value authorisations originates from one device/IP THEN a card-testing rule SHALL fire

tasks.title: Card rules: impossible-travel, amount-anomaly, MCC, AVS/CVV
acceptance: WHEN two transactions for one card occur in geographies unreachable within the elapsed time THEN an impossible-travel rule SHALL fire
WHEN the transaction amount z-score against the card baseline exceeds threshold T THEN an amount-anomaly signal SHALL be emitted
WHEN the merchant MCC is in the high-risk set OR the AVS/CVV check mismatches THEN the corresponding soft signal SHALL be emitted

tasks.title: Decisioning v0: risk bands → action + reason codes (rules-only)
acceptance: WHEN rule signals are aggregated into a risk band THEN the engine SHALL select exactly one action from {approve, decline, step-up, review, hold}
WHEN a decision is produced THEN it SHALL attach the reason codes of the dominant contributing rules

tasks.title: Audit log writer (immutable, replayable) → Postgres
acceptance: WHEN a decision is emitted THEN exactly one immutable audit record SHALL be written via the async path containing inputs, feature snapshot, rule/model versions, score, and reason codes
WHEN an audit record is replayed THEN the engine SHALL reproduce the identical decision

tasks.title: Hot-path latency harness (rules-only p99)
acceptance: WHEN the rules-only decision path is load-tested THEN p50/p99/p999 latency and sustained throughput SHALL be measured and reported

tasks.title: Stream processor: per-entity windowed aggregates → online store
acceptance: WHEN transaction events stream in THEN per-entity aggregate and velocity features over 1m/5m/1h/24h/7d/30d windows SHALL be maintained and written to the online feature store
WHERE events are partitioned by entity key THEN per-entity windowed state SHALL be computed within a single partition

tasks.title: Online feature store (Redis) + hot-path read integration
acceptance: WHEN the hot path requests features for an entity THEN it SHALL read precomputed aggregates from the online store within the per-call timeout
WHEN an event updates an aggregate THEN the online store SHALL reflect it within the configured freshness bound

tasks.title: Feature taxonomy + request-time deviation derivation
acceptance: WHEN a decision is made THEN request-time deviation features (amount ÷ rolling mean, geo distance from usual, z-score) SHALL be derived from looked-up state without a store write

tasks.title: Offline feature store + point-in-time joins + parity check
acceptance: WHEN the offline store materialises a feature for training THEN the join SHALL use only values as-of the event timestamp
WHEN the same event is scored online and offline THEN the two feature vectors SHALL match within tolerance

tasks.title: Fail-safe degradation (feature-store timeout → rules-only)
acceptance: WHEN the online feature store exceeds its per-call timeout THEN the hot path SHALL fall back to rules-only and SHALL still return a decision within the latency SLA

tasks.title: Python training pipeline (LightGBM, cost-sensitive, calibrated)
acceptance: WHEN the pipeline trains on labelled data THEN it SHALL produce a LightGBM model trained cost-sensitively and a calibrated score (isotonic or Platt)
WHEN the calibrated model is evaluated THEN its score SHALL approximate the true fraud probability on a held-out set

tasks.title: ONNX export + in-process inference in Rust
acceptance: WHEN a trained model is exported to ONNX THEN the engine SHALL load it and score a feature vector in-process with no network call
WHEN the same feature vector is scored in Python and in the Rust engine THEN the scores SHALL match within tolerance

tasks.title: Score fusion + expected-value action selection
acceptance: WHEN rule signals and the calibrated model score are fused THEN the action SHALL be selected by expected value over the configured cost matrix
WHEN a hard rule override is present THEN it SHALL win regardless of the model score

tasks.title: SHAP reason codes from the model
acceptance: WHEN the model scores a transaction THEN the top contributing features SHALL be mapped to stable, versioned reason codes attached to the decision

tasks.title: Delayed-label simulation + two label streams + random-control holdout
acceptance: WHEN a fraudulent transaction is approved THEN a chargeback label SHALL arrive after a configurable simulated delay
WHEN traffic is sampled into the random control holdout THEN those transactions SHALL be scored but not acted upon, yielding unbiased labels

tasks.title: Evaluation harness (PR-AUC, recall@FPR, precision@N, alert-to-fraud)
acceptance: WHEN a model is evaluated on labelled simulation data THEN PR-AUC, recall at a fixed FPR, precision at N, and the alert-to-fraud ratio SHALL be reported
WHERE a metrics report is produced THEN accuracy SHALL NOT appear as a headline metric

tasks.title: Model registry + champion-challenger + shadow + PSI drift
acceptance: WHEN a challenger model is deployed THEN it SHALL shadow-score live traffic without affecting decisions
WHEN feature or score PSI exceeds the configured threshold THEN a drift alert SHALL fire and a retraining trigger SHALL be recorded

tasks.title: Entity resolution → identity graph
acceptance: WHEN records share identifiers (device, phone, email, address, card) THEN entity resolution SHALL cluster them into identity-graph entities via normalise → block → match → cluster
WHERE a shared identifier is high-cardinality and weak (e.g. a shared public IP) THEN it SHALL NOT by itself merge distinct entities

tasks.title: Transaction graph construction (temporal, weighted)
acceptance: WHEN transactions are processed THEN a directed, time-stamped, weighted transaction graph SHALL be built and updated with amount/count/recency edge attributes

tasks.title: Graph features (centrality, community, shortest-path-to-bad) → online store
acceptance: WHEN the graph batch runs THEN per-node centrality (PageRank, personalised-PageRank from known-bad), community id/size, and shortest-path-to-bad features SHALL be materialised to the online feature store

tasks.title: Ring + temporal-motif detection (cycles, fan-in/out, scatter-gather)
acceptance: WHEN a time-ordered directed cycle or a fan-in→fan-out / scatter-gather motif appears THEN a fraud-ring alert SHALL be raised listing the participating entities and the matched typology

tasks.title: Mule-account detection (signature fusion)
acceptance: WHEN an account shows fan-in from dispersed sources then fan-out to few destinations, a pass-through ratio near 1, and short dwell time THEN a mule-account alert SHALL be raised
WHEN a dormant account suddenly receives and forwards large funds THEN the dormant-then-active signal SHALL contribute to the mule score

tasks.title: Sanctions/PEP/adverse-media screening (fuzzy+phonetic, FP reduction)
acceptance: WHEN an entity name matches a watchlist by fuzzy/phonetic score above threshold AND a secondary identifier (DOB/nationality/ID) corroborates THEN a screening alert SHALL be raised
WHEN a watchlist delta is ingested THEN the existing customer base SHALL be rescreened in batch and new true matches SHALL alert

tasks.title: AML monitoring rules (typology-tagged R1–R14)
acceptance: WHEN sub-threshold deposits cluster just below the CTR threshold within a window THEN a structuring alert tagged with its typology SHALL be raised
WHEN credits arrive from many geographies and debits concentrate to few destinations THEN a funnel-account alert SHALL be raised
WHEN an outbound transfer is matched by an inbound of near-equal size within the round-trip window THEN a round-tripping alert SHALL be raised

tasks.title: Case lifecycle state machine + review queue + four-eyes
acceptance: WHEN an alert is created THEN it SHALL enter the case lifecycle (alert → triage → investigate → close/escalate/file-sar) with risk-prioritised ordering in the review queue
WHEN a SAR is approved or filed THEN the checker SHALL be a different analyst from the maker

tasks.title: SAR/STR generation (deadlines, continuing-activity, CTR, tipping-off)
acceptance: WHEN a case is dispositioned to file THEN a SAR SHALL be generated with a filing deadline and a continuing-activity follow-up SHALL be scheduled, and the subject SHALL NOT be notified
WHEN cash movement exceeds the CTR threshold THEN a CTR SHALL be produced independently of any suspicion finding

tasks.title: Feedback loop: labels → offline store → retraining trigger
acceptance: WHEN an investigator dispositions a case THEN an investigator label SHALL be written to the offline store and feed the retraining dataset
WHEN blocked transactions accumulate THEN reject inference SHALL estimate their outcomes so training is not biased by the engine's own declines

tasks.title: Analyst dashboard API + design-brief handoff
acceptance: WHEN an analyst opens the queue THEN the API SHALL return risk-prioritised cases with their alerts, evidence, reason codes, and graph links
WHERE the visual layer is built THEN it SHALL be produced via design-creator from a structured design-brief (constraints only, no narrative)

verify.handle: curl the analyst API + design-creator brief review

tasks.title: P2P pack: APP-fraud signals + new-payee + Confirmation of Payee
acceptance: WHEN a first payment to a new payee exceeds the payer's historical maximum and the payee is not commonly paid by peers THEN a Confirmation-of-Payee check and a step-up SHALL be triggered
WHERE the P2P pack is loaded THEN the engine core SHALL remain free of P2P-specific logic (it plugs in via the feature/rule/action interfaces)

tasks.title: P2P: coercion/behavioral signals + holds + recipient-side mule freeze
acceptance: WHEN a payment is initiated shortly after an inbound call with segmented-typing / session-dead-time biometrics THEN a hold and a coercion-specific warning SHALL be applied
WHEN the recipient account is scored as a likely mule THEN inbound credit SHALL be held/frozen and a SAR SHALL be raised

tasks.title: Crypto pack: on-chain ledger sim + address clustering
acceptance: WHEN the on-chain ledger is simulated THEN address clustering SHALL group common-input-ownership addresses while excluding CoinJoin transactions from the merge

tasks.title: Crypto: taint tracing (FIFO) + exposure scoring
acceptance: WHEN funds flow from a known-bad cluster THEN FIFO taint tracing SHALL compute direct and indirect exposure with no fixed hop cutoff
WHEN a peel-chain or chain-hopping pattern is present THEN it SHALL be detected and contribute to the exposure score

tasks.title: Crypto: sanctioned-address (date-versioned) + scam-token/phishing/poisoning
acceptance: WHEN a transfer touches a sanctioned address as-of the transaction date THEN it SHALL be blocked (and a later delisting SHALL NOT retroactively unblock the past decision)
WHEN a lookalike address (matching prefix/suffix) appears shortly after a real transfer THEN an address-poisoning warning SHALL fire
WHEN a VASP-to-VASP transfer at or above the de-minimis lacks Travel Rule data THEN it SHALL be flagged

tasks.title: Prod-readiness: load test to SLA + backpressure + fail-safe + benchmarks
acceptance: WHEN the full engine is load-tested at approximately 20,000 tx/s THEN p99 latency SHALL be under 20 ms
WHEN a dependency (online store or model) is faulted under load THEN fail-safe degradation SHALL hold and the SLA SHALL still be met

tasks.title: Simulation control dashboard API + design-brief
acceptance: WHEN an operator selects a typology scenario THEN the simulation API SHALL inject it and stream live decision and metric updates
WHERE the visual layer is built THEN it SHALL be produced via design-creator from a structured design-brief

verify.handle: drive the sim API + design-creator brief review
